style.fileNaming: kebab-case for directories, UPPERCASE for root docs (CLAUDE.md, README.md), lowercase for nested docs (agent.md)
style.versionFormat: footer block with Version, Last Updated, Compatible with

forbiddenActions: Modifying Version footer blocks (managed by versioning rules in CLAUDE.md)
Modifying existing changelog entries in shared/documentation-principles.md (temporal, append-only)
crossRefFormat: relative-markdown-links for navigation, backtick-paths for 'go read this' references
authoritativeSources: shared/documentation-principles.md (single source of truth for governance principles)
plugin.json files (source of truth for version numbers)
